title: Bouncing Balls API
body:
API to add Bouncing Balls.

This mod alone does nothing. This mod will handle Bouncing Balls logic in other mods and allows to simply make Bouncing Balls made of materials created by other mods.

Used by:
- [Bouncing Balls](https://modrinth.com/mod/bouncing-balls)
- [Teletubbies Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/teletubbies/)
